rule_name: Supply Chain Failures - Vulnerable Component Exploitation
search_query:
index=main sourcetype=_json _index_earliest=-1m
| rex field=_raw "(?<uri_path>[^\s]+)"
| where match(uri_path, "(jndi:(ldap|rmi)://|/package-lock\.json|/\.npmrc|/composer\.lock)")
  AND NOT match(uri_path, "(\.\./|\.\.%2[Ff])")
| eval rule="A03", sev="Critical"
| table _time, src_ip, uri_path, rule, sev
